mechanism_narrative: Sustained declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 3.8 percent within a single month, it signals a rapid deterioration in labor market conditions that historically precedes equity drawdowns as earnings revisions turn negative.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in more than 60 percent of instances where UNRATE crosses 3.8 percent upward.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous contraction in industrial production and a decline in real consumer credit availability compresses near-term corporate revenue growth expectations, driving negative equity returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: The joint negative signal fails to predict negative 60-day forward returns in more than 50 percent of out-of-sample observations.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-interest-rate environment, a month-over-month decline in housing starts acts as a leading indicator of broader demand weakness, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: HOUST declines do not lead to negative 20-day forward returns when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5 percent in more than 50 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls sustains consumer spending power, which supports corporate earnings and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth fails to correlate with positive 5-day forward returns (Rank IC below 0.02) over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the CPI index exceeds 300, markets price in prolonged restrictive policy, compressing equity multiples and driving negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are not significantly negative when CPIAUCSL remains above 300.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where real GDP growth slows while the federal funds rate remains elevated creates a policy error risk, leading to negative equity returns over the subsequent quarter as earnings forecasts are cut.
failure_condition: The joint signal of slowing GDP and high rates fails to predict negative 60-day forward returns in more than 50 percent of out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of tight labor markets, a sustained rise in the unemployment rate signals a supply-demand rebalancing that historically precedes equity corrections over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises above 0.2 percentage points in one month
failure_condition: Rising UNRATE fails to predict negative 20-day forward returns when INDPRO is below trend in more than 50 percent of instances.
